phases.name: Starter Items
phases.desc: Begin each game with a small amount of gold (500). Starter items give you sustain through the laning phase.

phases.name: Core Build
phases.desc: Your core items define your role. These usually cost 2,500–3,500 gold and are completed by mid-game.

phases.name: Full Build
phases.desc: A full build consists of 6 items. Reaching this stage means your champion has reached maximum power potential.
